product_overview: LearnToTeach, branded as Kino, is a YKS coaching SaaS that helps coaches manage students, weekly study plans, exams, notes, and chat in one role-based platform. Students use the app to follow their assigned program, update progress, review performance, and communicate with their coach.
core_goals: Allow coaches to sign up, sign in, and access coach-only tools
Let coaches create and manage student accounts and view student progress
Enable coaches to assign and edit weekly 7x10 study plans
Let students view their assigned plan and mark task completion progress
Support exam net tracking and progress chart review for coaches and students
Enable coach-student messaging with realtime updates and optional file sharing
Show notifications and dashboard activity updates for both roles

features.name: Landing and public access
features.description: Public visitors can learn about the product and move into the sign-in or coach registration flows.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the product introduction and feature panels -> Choose to go to sign-in -> Arrive at /login
Navigate to / -> View the product introduction and feature panels -> Choose to start as a coach -> Arrive at /register

features.name: Coach registration and sign-in
features.description: Coaches can create an account, sign in with email and password, and reach the coach area after authentication.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Enter the required account details -> Submit the registration form -> See successful account creation and proceed to sign in
Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit the sign-in form -> Arrive at /coach/dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter invalid email or password values -> Submit the sign-in form -> See validation or access rejection feedback

features.name: Coach dashboard overview
features.description: Coaches can review their overall student performance, activity updates, and status summaries from the main dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /coach/dashboard -> Review summary statistics -> Review student status list -> Review recent activity feed -> See dashboard overview
Navigate to /coach/dashboard -> Switch the status filter -> See the student list update
Navigate to /coach/dashboard -> Switch the activity filter -> See the activity feed update
Navigate to /coach/dashboard -> Dismiss the recommendation banner -> See the banner disappear

features.name: Student management
features.description: Coaches can view the student list, create new student accounts, and open a student profile for deeper management.
user_flows: Navigate to /coach/students -> Review the student list -> Create a new student account -> See a temporary password displayed
Navigate to /coach/students -> Select a student -> Open the student detail page at /coach/students/[id]
Navigate to /coach/students/[id] -> Review the student profile data -> Switch between available detail sections -> See the selected section content

features.name: Student weekly program management
features.description: Coaches and students can work with the 7x10 weekly plan, with coaches editing assignments and students updating completion state.
user_flows: Navigate to /coach/students/[id] -> Open the weekly plan section -> Edit a task assignment -> See the updated plan saved
Navigate to /student/weekly -> Review the weekly grid -> Update a task completion state -> See the completion progress change
Navigate to /student/weekly -> Mark multiple tasks across the grid -> See the weekly completion summary update

features.name: Exam results and progress charts
features.description: Coaches and students can record exam performance and review trend charts for progress tracking.
user_flows: Navigate to /coach/exams -> Review exam results and progress charts -> See student exam trend data
Navigate to /student/exams -> Review personal exam results and charts -> See score progress over time
Navigate to /student/exams -> Add a new exam result -> See the chart and metrics update

features.name: Coach notes
features.description: Coaches can create and update notes tied to a student record.
user_flows: Navigate to /coach/students/[id] -> Open the notes section -> Add a new note -> See the note appear in the list
Navigate to /coach/notes -> Review stored notes -> Open a note for editing -> Save the update -> See the revised note content

features.name: Realtime chat
features.description: Coaches and students can exchange messages in realtime, with support for read receipts and optional file uploads.
user_flows: Navigate to /coach/chat -> Select a student conversation -> Write a message -> Send it -> See the message appear in the thread
Navigate to /student/chat -> Open the coach conversation -> Write a message -> Send it -> See the message appear in the thread
Navigate to /coach/chat -> Select a conversation -> Attach a file -> Send the message -> See the uploaded content in the chat thread
Navigate to /student/chat -> Open a conversation -> Read incoming messages -> See the unread indicator clear after viewing

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Users can view notification updates from the notification panel and see new items arrive in realtime.
user_flows: Navigate to /coach/dashboard -> Open the notification panel -> Review recent notifications -> Close the panel
Navigate to /student/dashboard -> Open the notification panel -> Review recent notifications -> Close the panel
Navigate to /coach/dashboard -> Wait for a new notification to arrive -> See the notification list update

features.name: Student dashboard
features.description: Students can review motivation, invitations, and progress indicators from their main overview screen.
user_flows: Navigate to /student/dashboard -> Review the motivation message -> Review the weekly progress indicator -> See the personal overview
Navigate to /student/dashboard -> Review invitation or activity updates -> See the dashboard content refresh

project.name: LearnToTeach
project.description: YKS coaching SaaS for coaches and students, branded as Kino.
project.architecture: OOP Clean Architecture with Next.js App Router and Supabase.

runtime.backend: Next.js server actions and route handlers

project.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 plus global CSS utility classes

backend: Supabase Admin API for coach-created student accounts
realtime: Supabase Realtime for dashboards, chat, and notifications
storage: Supabase Storage for chat file uploads
email: Nodemailer SMTP for password and notification flows

public_routes.purpose: Landing page with product value proposition and navigation.
Email/password sign-in for coach and student roles.

coach_routes.purpose: Coach overview, statistics, activity, and student status.
Student list and student creation/invitation management.
Student detail with weekly plan, exams, notes, and profile data.
Exam result management and progress review.

student_routes.purpose: Student overview, motivation, invitations, and activity.
Weekly task grid and completion updates.

authentication: Middleware-protected coach and student route groups.
coach_student_management: Coaches can create and manage student accounts.
Coach-student engagement and invitation state are modeled.
Student status and completion rate are derived by domain services.
weekly_programs: Coach edit flows for student weekly programs.
Student read/update flows for task completion.
Turkish date and ISO week utilities.
exams_and_lesson_nets: Exam results and score value objects.
Net tracking pages for coach and student.
notes: Coach notes tied to students and engagements.
notifications: Notification domain model and Supabase repository.
dashboard: Coach dashboard stats, activity feed, and realtime refresh.
Student dashboard motivation, invitations, and realtime refresh.

responsibilities: Entities, value objects, domain services, and domain errors.
Business logic for student status, task completion, motivation, and exam progress.
Use cases, ports, and DTOs for app workflows.
Supabase repositories, queries, auth services, email, storage, realtime adapters, cache helpers, and dependency injection.
Reusable UI components, charts, layout, skeletons, chat, weekly grid, dashboard widgets, and notifications.
App Router pages, layouts, server actions, and API routes.

frontend: Public landing navigation to login and registration.
Login validation and invalid credentials handling.
Student list, student detail tabs, and CRUD flows where credentials allow.
Weekly grid editing and completion toggles.
Exam and lesson net forms and charts.
backend: Server action validation and auth checks.
Role-based authorization for coach and student actions.
Realtime-adjacent queries and cache revalidation paths.

env: .env.local is required for Supabase, SMTP, and app runtime configuration.

auth_test_data.note: End-to-end authenticated flows require valid coach and student credentials in the configured Supabase project.
